overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character riding a horse through a grassy valley toward a large waterfall. The overcast dusk lighting creates a moody atmosphere as the rider navigates from meadow to rocky terrain at the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy valley trail approaching distant waterfall

agents.ego_description: trotting steadily on horseback through the grassy meadow toward the waterfall in the distance

entered.detail: large cascading waterfall visible in the distance between cliff faces
tall rocky cliff wall forming the left boundary of the valley
rocky outcrop and boulders on the right side of the valley
green grass covering the valley floor forming a natural trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide grassy valley view. The rider moves steadily forward on horseback through the meadow, with a large waterfall visible in the distant center, framed by cliff faces on both sides. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the lush green terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky waterfall base with mist and pool

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy meadow to rocky shoreline at the waterfall base
horse slows to a walk and comes to a complete stop at the rocky edge of the waterfall pool

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse across uneven rocky terrain approaching the waterfall, then slowing to a stop near the water's edge

notable_agents.action: standing motionless near the base of the waterfall, partially obscured by mist

entered.detail: greenish water pool collecting at the base of the falling water
white spray and mist rising from the impact of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to rocky ground as the rider approaches the waterfall's base. A pool of greenish water appears on the right, with mist rising from the falls. An NPC stands near the waterfall on the left. The horse slows and stops at the rocky shore, with the massive waterfall now dominating the center view and cliffs rising on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush grassy valley that gradually narrows into a rocky basin at the foot of a massive waterfall. It begins with a wide view of the rider moving steadily through a green meadow under a diffused, overcast sky, with the distant falls framed by towering cliff faces. As the rider advances, the soft terrain shifts into rugged, rocky ground, and a pool of greenish water emerges on the right amidst rising mist. The scene then closes in as the horse slows to a stop on the shore near a waiting NPC, allowing the towering waterfall and steep cliffs to dominate the frame.
